---
name: Spec change
about: Propose a change to a Phase 0 specification document
title: "[spec] "
labels: phase-0, spec
---

## Which spec file?

(e.g. `specs/02-data-model.sql`)

## Summary

One sentence: what changes and why.

## Motivation

What problem does this solve? Cite the section/line in the current spec that is wrong, incomplete, or under-constrained.

## Proposed change

Show the change as a diff or a complete replacement of the affected section.

## Cross-file impact

Which other spec files must change to stay consistent?

- [ ] `00-overview.md`
- [ ] `01-architecture.md`
- [ ] `02-data-model.sql`
- [ ] `03-command-spec.md`
- [ ] `04-effect-protocol.md`
- [ ] `05-security-model.md`
- [ ] `06-context-and-memory.md`
- [ ] `07-workflows-and-replay.md`
- [ ] `08-api-spec.md`
- [ ] `09-sdk-design.md`
- [ ] `10-alpha-demo.md`
- [ ] `11-roadmap.md`
- [ ] `12-glossary.md`

## Invariants affected

List invariants from `05-security-model.md` that this change strengthens, weakens, or replaces.

## Risks

What could this change break in Phase 1+?
